title: OpenEMS - Open Source Energy Management System
note: Open-source energy management system used as a plausible alternative and enabler for distributed energy control.

title: OpenADR Specification
note: Open demand-response specification used as an interoperability enabler for flexible load and distributed energy coordination.

title: Open Automated Demand Response Communications Specification
note: Technical source describing OpenADR as an open standards-based model for demand-response information exchange.

title: OpenADR: Using OpenADR for DER
note: DER-focused OpenADR source supporting the distributed-resource coordination concepts.

title: The Open Energy Modelling Framework (oemof) - A new approach to facilitate open science in energy system modelling
note: Research source for open-source energy system modeling as an enabler of transparent planning alternatives.

title: Open Source IoT platform for Energy Management
note: Open-source IoT and energy-management platform relevant to distributed building, industrial, and microgrid control.
